Package tellui.core.effect

Class AbstractShadow

java.lang.Object
tellui.core.base.View
tellui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
Direct Known Subclasses:
PlainShadow, ReactiveShadow
public abstract class AbstractShadow extends View
Abstract base class for shadow effects that can be applied to ContentView components. Provides common functionality for managing shadow properties such as color, weight (intensity), and target component association.

Subclasses must implement the View.render() method to define specific shadow drawing logic. This class manages the relationship between shadow effects and their target components, allowing shadows to be positioned and sized relative to their targets.

See Also:
  • ContentView
  • AbstractColor
  • View

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractShadow

      public AbstractShadow()
      Constructs an AbstractShadow with default properties. Default shadow has right and bottom weight with transparent black color.

  • Method Details

    • setCustomBounds

      public void setCustomBounds(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Sets custom bounds for this shadow, overriding the target's bounds. The shadow will use the specified position and size instead of the target's.
      Parameters:
      x - position X of shadow
      y - position Y of shadow
      width - current width of shadow
      height - current height of shadow

    • getTarget

      public ContentView getTarget()
      Returns the target ContentView for this shadow.
      Returns:
      the target ContentView, or null if not set

    • setTarget

      public AbstractShadow setTarget(ContentView target)
      Sets the target ContentView for this shadow. The shadow will be positioned and sized relative to this target.
      Parameters:
      target - the ContentView to apply shadow to (cannot be null)
      Returns:
      this AbstractShadow for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if target is null

    • getColor

      public AbstractColor getColor()
      Returns the color of this shadow.
      Returns:
      the shadow color

    • setColor

      public AbstractShadow setColor(AbstractColor color)
      Sets the color of this shadow.
      Parameters:
      color - the shadow color to set (cannot be null)
      Returns:
      this AbstractShadow for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if color is null

    • getWeightLeft

      public float getWeightLeft()
      Returns the left shadow weight (intensity).
      Returns:
      the left shadow weight

    • getWeightTop

      public float getWeightTop()
      Returns the top shadow weight (intensity).
      Returns:
      the top shadow weight

    • getWeightRight

      public float getWeightRight()
      Returns the right shadow weight (intensity).
      Returns:
      the right shadow weight

    • getWeightBottom

      public float getWeightBottom()
      Returns the bottom shadow weight (intensity).
      Returns:
      the bottom shadow weight

    • hasWeightLeft

      public boolean hasWeightLeft()
      Checks if left shadow weight is non-zero.
      Returns:
      true if left weight is not 0, false otherwise

    • hasWeightTop

      public boolean hasWeightTop()
      Checks if top shadow weight is non-zero.
      Returns:
      true if top weight is not 0, false otherwise

    • hasWeightRight

      public boolean hasWeightRight()
      Checks if right shadow weight is non-zero.
      Returns:
      true if right weight is not 0, false otherwise

    • hasWeightBottom

      public boolean hasWeightBottom()
      Checks if bottom shadow weight is non-zero.
      Returns:
      true if bottom weight is not 0, false otherwise

    • hasWeight

      public boolean hasWeight()
      Checks if any shadow weight is non-zero.
      Returns:
      true if any weight (left, top, right, or bottom) is not 0, false otherwise
